Key.Chinesesimp: 虚拟人工智能系统（配置文件）

Key.English: Enables external Database persistence for Virtual AI
Key.Chinesesimp: 为虚拟AI启用外部数据库持久化

Key.English: Enables sector colouring according to units presence
Key.Chinesesimp: 根据单位存在启用扇区着色

Key.English: Virtualize all editor placed units except synced units
Key.Chinesesimp: 虚拟化除同步单位外的所有编辑器放置单位

Key.English: Sets the distance from players to spawn AI units
Key.Chinesesimp: 设置玩家与AI单位生成的距离

Key.English: Sets the max number of virtualized AI *groups* to spawn at any one time
Key.Chinesesimp: 设置任何时候要生成的虚拟化AI*组*的最大数量

Key.English: If enabled, active zeus entities will spawn virtual groups when in range
Key.Chinesesimp: 如果启用,活动的宙斯实体将在范围内生成虚拟组

Key.English: The radius around player in planes to spawn AI. Set to 0 to disable spawning while in planes
Key.Chinesesimp: 玩家在平面上生成AI的半径。设置为0可禁用在平面中生成

Key.English: The radius around player in helicopters to spawn AI. Set to 0 to disable spawning while in helicopters
Key.Chinesesimp: 玩家在直升机上生成人工智能的半径。设置为0可在直升机中禁用生成

Key.English: The radius around player controlled UAV to spawn AI. Set to 0 to disable spawning while controlling UAVs. Set to -1 to default to (Infantry) Spawn Radius + 800.
Key.Chinesesimp: 玩家控制的无人机周围的半径生产出AI。设置为0禁用生成时控制无人机。设置为-1默认为(步兵)生成半径 + 800.

Key.English: Alters how fast virtual AI move across the map. 0.25 means 25% of a unit's normal speed
Key.Chinesesimp: 改变虚拟AI在地图上移动的速度。25%是指单位正常速度的25%

Key.English: Only one Virtual AI System module can be used
Key.Chinesesimp: 只能使用一个虚拟AI系统模块

Key.English: Toggle debug mode on the profile system
Key.Chinesesimp: 切换配置文件系统上的调试模式

Key.English: Sets the pace of virtual combat. Fastest combat resolves twice as quickly as regular.
Key.Chinesesimp: 设置虚拟战斗的节奏.最快的战斗解决速度是普通战斗的两倍.

Key.English: Sets the range of virtual combat in metres.
Key.Chinesesimp: 以米为单位设置虚拟战斗的范围

Key.English:
Experimental!
This feature is highly experimental and could break missions.
 Please disable if you notice any issues.
Profiles will use intelligent pathing to reach their destinations.
Key.Chinesesimp:
实验的!
这项功能是高度实验性的,可能会破坏任务.
如果发现任何问题,请禁用.
配置文件将使用智能路径到达目的地.

Key.English:
Experimental!
This feature is highly experimental and could break missions.
 Please disable if you notice any issues.
Profiles will use intelligent pathing to reach their destinations.
Key.Chinesesimp:
实验的!
这项功能是高度实验性的,可能会破坏任务.
如果发现任何问题,请禁用.
配置文件将使用智能路径到达目的地.

Key.English: Experimental!\nAdds a boat to a virtual infantry entity that tries to cross water!
Key.Chinesesimp: 实验的!\n将一艘船添加到一个试图穿越水面的虚拟步兵实体!

Key.English: Sleep values between spawning units to not overload engine
Key.Chinesesimp: 生成单位之间的睡眠值不会使引擎过载

Key.English: Seconds of damage immunity granted to a profile-spawned vehicle after creation. The engine needs a brief window to resolve collisions and settle the vehicle's pose before damage takes effect; without it, vehicles spawning near terrain features sometimes explode immediately. The unified spawn-position validator (#850) covers the common cases by finding clear spots beforehand; this window catches residual edge cases where no clear spot was available and the vehicle landed on its original profile position. Higher values are safer but mean newly-spawned enemy vehicles are briefly invulnerable. Default 15 s.
Key.French: Nombre de secondes d'immunite aux degats accordees a un vehicule issu d'un profil apres sa creation. Le moteur a besoin d'une breve fenetre pour resoudre les collisions et stabiliser la pose du vehicule avant que les degats prennent effet ; sans cela, les vehicules apparaissant pres d'elements de terrain explosent parfois immediatement. Le validateur unifie de position de spawn (#850) couvre les cas courants en trouvant des emplacements degages au prealable ; cette fenetre rattrape les cas residuels ou aucun emplacement n'a ete trouve et le vehicule a atterri sur sa position de profil initiale. Des valeurs plus elevees sont plus surs mais signifient que les vehicules ennemis fraichement apparus sont brievement invulnerables. Par defaut : 15 s.
Key.Portuguese: Segundos de imunidade a danos concedidos a um veiculo gerado a partir de um perfil apos a sua criacao. O motor precisa de uma breve janela para resolver colisoes e estabilizar a pose do veiculo antes de o dano produzir efeito ; sem ela, veiculos que surgem proximos de elementos do terreno por vezes explodem imediatamente. O validador unificado de posicao de spawn (#850) cobre os casos comuns ao encontrar pontos livres com antecedencia ; esta janela apanha os casos residuais em que nao havia ponto livre e o veiculo aterrou na sua posicao original de perfil. Valores mais altos sao mais seguros mas significam que os veiculos inimigos recem-criados ficam brevemente invulneraveis. Padrao: 15 s.
Key.Russian: Сколько секунд защиты от урона получает транспорт, появившийся из профиля, сразу после создания. Движку нужно небольшое окно, чтобы разрешить коллизии и стабилизировать позу транспорта до того, как урон начнёт действовать ; без этого транспорт, появляющийся рядом с элементами местности, иногда взрывается сразу. Единый валидатор позиции спавна (#850) покрывает обычные случаи, заранее находя свободные точки ; это окно ловит остаточные случаи, когда свободной точки не нашлось, и транспорт оказался на своей исходной позиции профиля. Большие значения безопаснее, но означают, что только что появившийся вражеский транспорт ненадолго неуязвим. По умолчанию 15 с.
Key.Spanish: Segundos de inmunidad al dano concedidos a un vehiculo generado desde un perfil tras su creacion. El motor necesita una breve ventana para resolver colisiones y estabilizar la pose del vehiculo antes de que el dano surta efecto ; sin ella, los vehiculos que aparecen cerca de elementos del terreno a veces explotan de inmediato. El validador unificado de posicion de spawn (#850) cubre los casos comunes al encontrar puntos despejados con antelacion ; esta ventana captura los casos residuales en los que no habia punto despejado y el vehiculo aterrizo en su posicion original de perfil. Valores mas altos son mas seguros, pero significa que los vehiculos enemigos recien aparecidos son brevemente invulnerables. Predeterminado: 15 s.
Key.Chinese: 由設定檔生成車輛時,生成後給予的傷害免疫秒數。引擎需要短暫窗口來處理碰撞並使車輛姿態穩定,之後傷害才會生效;若無此窗口,在地形物件附近生成的車輛偶爾會立即爆炸。統一生成位置驗證器 (#850) 透過事先尋找乾淨位置覆蓋常見情況;此窗口處理殘餘狀況 — 找不到乾淨位置時,車輛落在原始設定檔位置。較高的值更安全,但代表剛生成的敵方車輛短暫無敵。預設:15 秒。
Key.Chinesesimp: 由设定档生成车辆时,生成后给予的伤害免疫秒数。引擎需要短暂窗口来处理碰撞并使车辆姿态稳定,之后伤害才会生效;若无此窗口,在地形物件附近生成的车辆偶尔会立即爆炸。统一生成位置验证器 (#850) 通过事先寻找干净位置覆盖常见情况;此窗口处理残余状况 — 找不到干净位置时,车辆落在原始设定档位置。较高的值更安全,但代表刚生成的敌方车辆短暂无敌。默认:15 秒。

Key.English: Seconds to keep an AI-owned profiled vehicle spawned after the last player leaves it. Prevents vehicles vanishing under players who were riding in or commandeering AI assets. Default 300 (5 min).

Seconds to keep AI profiles near a player-death location spawned after the player dies, even if the player respawns outside normal spawn radius. Lets the remaining firefight play out naturally. Default 120.
Radius around a player-death position within which nearby AI profiles receive the Post-Death Grace linger. Default 500.
If a profile within its Post-Death linger window is still in combat when the grace would expire, extend the linger by this many seconds. Repeats while combat continues. Default 60.
